items.definition_en: A slow cooker is an electric pot that cooks food at a low temperature over a long time.
items.example_en: I use a slow cooker to make soup while I’m at work.

items.definition_en: An air purifier is a device that removes dust and allergens from indoor air.
items.example_en: We bought an air purifier because of our allergies.

items.definition_en: An espresso machine is an appliance that brews strong coffee by forcing hot water through ground coffee beans.
items.example_en: She makes coffee every morning with her espresso machine.

items.definition_en: A bread maker is a machine used for mixing, kneading, and baking bread at home.
items.example_en: I like using my bread maker to try new recipes.

items.definition_en: A deep fryer is an appliance used for frying foods by submerging them in hot oil.
items.example_en: He uses a deep fryer to make crispy fries.

items.definition_en: An electric kettle is a device that quickly boils water using electricity.
items.example_en: She boiled water for tea in the electric kettle.

items.definition_en: A garment steamer is an appliance that removes wrinkles from clothes using hot steam.
items.example_en: I use a garment steamer for my delicate blouses.

items.definition_en: An ice maker is a machine that freezes water into cubes or crushed ice.
items.example_en: The ice maker automatically refills the bin in the freezer.

items.definition_en: A juicer is a kitchen machine that extracts juice from fruits or vegetables.
items.example_en: He starts the day with fresh orange juice from his juicer.

items.definition_en: A robot vacuum is an automatic cleaner that moves around and vacuums floors by itself.
items.example_en: The robot vacuum cleans while I'm at work.

items.definition_en: A dehumidifier is a device that reduces humidity in the air.
items.example_en: We use a dehumidifier to prevent mold in the basement.

items.definition_en: A wine cooler is a small fridge made to keep wine at the best temperature.
items.example_en: He installed a wine cooler in his kitchen.

items.definition_en: A food dehydrator is a device that dries food for preservation by removing moisture.
items.example_en: She uses a food dehydrator to make dried fruit snacks.

items.definition_en: An egg cooker is a machine designed to boil or steam eggs automatically.
items.example_en: The egg cooker perfectly prepares soft or hard-boiled eggs.

items.definition_en: A coffee grinder is a tool for grinding coffee beans into smaller pieces.
items.example_en: He prefers to use a coffee grinder for fresh coffee.

items.definition_en: An electric grill is a cooking appliance used to grill food indoors.
items.example_en: They grilled burgers on the electric grill.

items.definition_en: A cordless phone is a telephone you can carry around the house.
items.example_en: She answered the cordless phone in the garden.

items.definition_en: A space heater is a portable device used to heat one small area or room.
items.example_en: The space heater kept the bedroom warm all night.

items.definition_en: A humidifier is a machine that adds moisture to the air.
items.example_en: In winter, we use a humidifier to prevent dry skin.

items.definition_en: An electric shaver is a machine used for shaving hair without water or cream.
items.example_en: He uses an electric shaver every morning.
